title: Create In Me

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Wash me clean of all my shadows
Like the morning washes dew
I've walked so far from grace and mercy
Now I'm finding my way back to You
Create in me a heart that's pure
Like silver flowing through the fire
Restore the joy I knew before
Lift me from these depths higher
Create in me something new
Every night I face my failures
Every morning seek Your face
The truth cuts deeper than the darkness
But Your love flows deeper still with grace
Create in me a heart that's pure
Like silver flowing through the fire
Restore the joy I knew before
Lift me from these depths higher
Create in me something new

sections.label: Bridge
lines: I'll teach the lost ones how to find You
Show them paths through wilderness
My voice will rise in honest worship
When You free me from this heaviness

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Let my spirit dance with freedom
Let my praise break through these walls
The sacrifice You truly seek is
Just this broken heart that calls
Create in me a heart that's pure
Like silver flowing through the fire
Restore the joy I knew before
Lift me from these depths higher
Create in me something new

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Create in me a heart that's pure
Like silver flowing through the fire
Restore the joy I knew before
Lift me from these depths higher
Create in me Create in me
Create in me something new

epigraph: Create in me a clean heart
